Document:
# Core Rule 3 - Do not be intolerant [color=SlateGray][italic]Revision A, 2025-10-11[/italic][/color]
This is a zero-tolerance rule. Do not disparage or discriminate by real or fictional species, ethnicity, gender, sexuality, disability, and religion.
## Examples [color=#449944]Appropriate:[/color] - Using identifiers such as "gay," "trans," or "disabled." - Firing or reassigning mobility impaired security officers for not meeting physical demands.
[color=#994444]Prohibited:[/color] - Purposefully misidentifying players. - Misusing identifiers as insults. - Using slurs such as "retard," "clanker," or "ligga." - Refusing to serve certain player species at a bar. - Firing a mute security officer despite meeting physical demands. - Degrading mobility impaired crew members for their disability.
